Stillia stillingifolia, also known as Wartmannia stillingifolia, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic properties. Bioactive constituents of Stillia stillingifolia include sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures.
